Kadir Has University

Visual Communication Design

Kadir Has University Department of Visual Communication Design is an academic unit that offers students education in areas such as visual media, interaction design, animation, photography. Aiming to provide creative and critical thinking skills by combining theoretical and practical processes, the department also offers international experience opportunities.
